recoverability.cdn.bubble.io: Partially recoverable — open CDN URLs work; HTTP 403 means object deleted/private in Bubble S3.
recoverability.equipd.co.uk/fileupload: Not recoverable via script from this environment — TLS/connection failures or server 500; URLs are Bubble-hosted file paths, not public CDN.

repairPlan.recommendation: Re-export from Bubble with cdn.bubble.io URLs in image columns, or bulk-download from Bubble File Manager / Data > All Equipment, then run a local folder-to-slug upload pass.
repairPlan.mappingKey: URL_Slug column matches listings.slug; image hash stored as bubble-{sha1}.ext in listing-images bucket.
